What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
S
Sarah M.

The Fence Man did an amazing job installing our new wood privacy fence. The crew was professional, efficient, and the fence looks fantastic! It really enhances our backyard and gives us the privacy we wanted. Highly recommend!

D
David K.

We needed a chain link fence installed around our commercial property for security. The Fence Man provided a quick and affordable solution. The installation was smooth, and the fence is exactly what we needed. Good work!

E
Emily R.

We chose The Fence Man to install a white vinyl picket fence around our front yard. The fence is beautiful and adds so much curb appeal to our home. The installation team was very professional and paid attention to every detail. Very happy with the results!

J
John S.

After a recent storm, our wood fence was damaged. The Fence Man came out quickly and repaired the fence perfectly. They were able to match the existing wood and the repairs are seamless. Great service!

The Fence Man — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every fence contractor project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The The Fence Man Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific fence contractor needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Nashville & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Nashville, TN and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Franklin Murfreesboro Brentwood Hendersonville Nashville Smyrna Gallatin La Vergne
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our fence contractor services.

How long will a wood fence last in Nashville's climate?

With proper maintenance and pressure-treated lumber, a wood fence can last 15-20 years, even with Nashville's humidity and occasional storms.

Do I need a permit to build a fence in Nashville?

Yes, most fence installations require a permit in Nashville. We handle the permit process for you, ensuring compliance with all local regulations.

What type of wood is best for fences in Nashville?

Pressure-treated pine is a popular and cost-effective choice for fences in Nashville. It's resistant to rot, insects, and the elements.

Built on Nashville Values

Get a free, no-obligation quote for your fencing project. Call now!
